name: Diploma in Civil Engineering
overview: The Diploma in Civil Engineering focuses on structural design, construction techniques, and infrastructure development. Students gain practical skills in structural analysis, material science, transportation engineering, water resource management, and soil mechanics. With NBA accreditation and modern laboratories, this program meets industry standards and prepares students for successful careers in construction and infrastructure sectors.
vision: The program envisions to create professionals in emerging field of civil engineering to meet aspirations of the society by transforming students to be technically skilled entrepreneurs, ethical and environmentally sensible civil engineers.
mission: To impart quality technical education in the field of civil engineering
Establish industry collaboration through internship and interaction with professional society through experts and workshops
Promote leadership, management and entrepreneurship skills in students through various projects, co-curriculum and extra-curriculum events
Develop environmental awareness and social responsibility
peos: Exhibit technical and leadership capabilities for providing sustainable solutions to various Civil Engineering problems with professional ethics
Inculcate state of the art technology for efficient implementation of Civil Engineering projects
Enhance social and economical commitment by entrepreneurial spirit as job creators
Pursue higher education and improve learning spirit in the context of technological changes
program_outcomes: Engineering practices for society, sustainability and environment
admission_process: Through Gujarat Common Entrance Test (GUJCET) conducted by Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC)

name: Diploma in Electrical Engineering
overview: The Diploma in Electrical Engineering focuses on electricity, power systems, and control mechanisms. Students learn about power generation, electrical motors, transmission systems, and renewable energy technologies through comprehensive theoretical and practical training. The program prepares graduates for diverse careers in power, manufacturing, and renewable energy sectors.
vision: To develop competent electrical engineering professionals with strong technical skills, entrepreneurial mindset and ethical values to serve industry and society.
mission: Prepare the students with strong fundamental concepts and problem solving skills to enhance their employability in the industries
To provide them a platform for developing new products that can help industry and society as a whole
Promote leadership and entrepreneurship skills in students through various projects, co-curriculum and extra-curriculum events
Imbibe social awareness and responsibility in students to serve the society and protect environment
peos: Apply the knowledge of electrical engineering to solve problems of industrial and social relevance
Pursue higher education and adopt to changing professional needs and engage in lifelong learning
Be professional with leadership qualities, ethics, moral values and work efficiently in a team
Fulfill social and economical commitments by entrepreneurial spirit
program_outcomes: Engineering practices for society, sustainability and environment
career_opportunities: Installation and testing of electrical equipment
admission_process: Through Gujarat Common Entrance Test (GUJCET) conducted by Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC)

name: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering
overview: The Diploma in Mechanical Engineering focuses on industrial production, machinery, and manufacturing processes. Students study mechanical system design, thermal engineering, production planning, and maintenance procedures. The comprehensive curriculum combines theoretical knowledge with extensive hands-on training to prepare industry-ready mechanical engineers.
vision: To create competent diploma mechanical engineers with humanities, leadership and entrepreneurship qualities.
mission: To impart quality technical education with hands-on training in manufacturing and industrial processes
Develop state-of-art laboratories and infrastructure for practical learning
Foster industry-institute interaction through internships and collaborative projects
Promote innovation, entrepreneurship and lifelong learning among students
peos: Successfully apply the principle of mechanical engineering in the industry
Pursue continued life long learning through professional practice and higher studies
Established as a successful entrepreneur
program_outcomes: Engineering practices for society, sustainability and environment
admission_process: Through Gujarat Common Entrance Test (GUJCET) conducted by Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC)

name: Diploma in Electronics & Communication Engineering
overview: The Diploma in Electronics & Communication Engineering focuses on computer, communication, and navigation electronics. Students explore IoT, Embedded Systems, VLSI, Integrated Circuits, and Medical Electronics through well-structured theoretical and practical training. The program prepares graduates for careers in telecommunications, electronics manufacturing, and emerging technologies.
vision: To prepare competent diploma level electronics and communication engineers, catering the needs of industries and society as an excellent employees, innovator and entrepreneur with moral values.
mission: Provide quality education in the field of EC engineering
Develop state of art laboratories, classrooms and up gradation of faculties
Strengthen industrial liaison by offering mutual beneficiaries services
peos: Successfully pursue professional Electronics and Communication engineering career working in multidisciplinary areas, focusing on innovation and entrepreneurship
Pursue higher education
Demonstrate societal and ethical responsibility in every domain of life
Adapt technological changes with focus on societal and environmental issues
program_outcomes: Engineering practices for society, sustainability and environment
career_opportunities: IT sector as programmers and developers
admission_process: Through Gujarat Common Entrance Test (GUJCET) conducted by Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC)

name: Diploma in Information & Communication Technology
overview: The Diploma in Information & Communication Technology focuses on computer networks, data communication, and software systems. Students learn image processing, networking, cybersecurity, and data analytics through a comprehensive curriculum. This modern program prepares graduates for the rapidly evolving IT and communication sectors with industry-relevant skills.
vision: To develop skilled ICT professionals capable of innovating and implementing technology solutions for industry and society.
mission: Provide quality education in Information and Communication Technology
Develop practical skills through modern laboratories and industry exposure
Foster innovation and entrepreneurship in technology sectors
Prepare students for global IT and communication industries
peos: Apply ICT knowledge to solve real-world problems in industry and society
Adapt to rapidly changing technology landscape through continuous learning
Demonstrate professional ethics and work effectively in teams
Pursue entrepreneurship or higher education in technology fields
program_outcomes: Engineering practices for society, sustainability and environment
admission_process: Through Gujarat Common Entrance Test (GUJCET) conducted by Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC)

name: Diploma in Information Technology
overview: The Diploma in Information Technology focuses on software development, networking, and data management. Students study cybersecurity, web development, database administration, and graphics design through comprehensive theoretical and practical sessions. This program prepares students for diverse IT careers with hands-on experience in latest technologies and methodologies.
vision: To produce competent IT professionals with strong technical foundation, problem-solving abilities, and ethical values.
mission: Provide quality education in software development and IT systems
Develop practical skills through project-based learning and industry internships
Promote innovation, creativity and entrepreneurial thinking
Prepare globally competitive IT professionals with ethical values
peos: Apply IT knowledge and skills to develop software solutions for industry needs
Pursue higher education and engage in continuous professional development
Work effectively as IT professionals with leadership and teamwork capabilities
Demonstrate entrepreneurial skills and contribute to technological advancement
program_outcomes: Engineering practices for society, sustainability and environment
admission_process: Through Gujarat Common Entrance Test (GUJCET) conducted by Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC)
